tripOverview.intro: London offers a perfect blend of historic charm and modern romance, from intimate riverside walks along the Thames to cozy pubs tucked away in ancient alleyways. This vibrant city welcomes all travelers with world-class museums, diverse neighborhoods, and an incredible food scene that will delight vegetarian palates.
tripOverview.vibe: A whirlwind romantic adventure through London's most charming neighborhoods, markets, and iconic landmarks.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April is ideal for London with mild temperatures, blooming flowers, and longer daylight hours perfect for exploring.

attractions.name: Tower Bridge
attractions.desc: Iconic Victorian bridge with stunning city views.

attractions.name: Westminster Abbey
attractions.desc: Historic royal church with beautiful Gothic architecture.

attractions.name: Tate Modern
attractions.desc: Contemporary art gallery in converted power station.

attractions.name: Hyde Park
attractions.desc: Large royal park perfect for romantic strolls.

destinationOverview.transportation: London's extensive public transport includes the Underground (Tube), buses, and river services that connect all major attractions efficiently. Black cabs are iconic but pricier, while Uber operates throughout the city as a convenient alternative. Purchase an Oyster Card or use contactless payment for seamless travel across all transport modes.
destinationOverview.tip: Download the Citymapper app for real-time transport updates and always stand right on escalators to let others pass on the left.
destinationOverview.safety: London is very safe for LGBTQ+ travelers with a vibrant community and welcoming atmosphere throughout the city.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with affordable eSIM data plans that activate instantly upon arrival in London.

days.intro: Start your London adventure with iconic landmarks and romantic riverside walks.

morning.name: Arrive at Heathrow
morning.desc: Land and take the Heathrow Express to Paddington Station.

morning.name: Check into Hotel
morning.desc: Drop bags and freshen up at your accommodation.

morning.name: Walk to Tower Bridge
morning.desc: Stroll across London's most iconic bridge hand in hand.

afternoon.name: Lunch at Coppa Club
afternoon.desc: Riverside dining with views of Tower Bridge.

afternoon.name: Borough Market
afternoon.desc: Explore London's most famous food market together.

evening.name: Dinner at Mildreds Soho
evening.desc: Award-winning vegetarian restaurant in vibrant Soho.

evening.name: Drinks at The George Inn
evening.desc: Historic pub dating back to the 17th century.

days.tip: Book Westminster Abbey tickets online in advance to skip the queues and save time.

days.intro: Dive deeper into London's cultural scene and vibrant food markets.

morning.name: Breakfast at The Breakfast Club
morning.desc: Quirky all-day breakfast spot with vegetarian options.

morning.name: British Museum
morning.desc: Explore world history and ancient treasures together.

morning.name: Coffee at Store Street Espresso
morning.desc: Specialty coffee roaster near the British Museum.

afternoon.name: Covent Garden
afternoon.desc: Browse shops and watch street performers.

afternoon.name: Tate Modern
afternoon.desc: World-class contemporary art with Thames views.

evening.name: Royal Vauxhall Tavern
evening.desc: Historic LGBTQ+ venue with drag shows.

days.tip: Many major museums in London offer free admission but appreciate donations.

days.intro: Enjoy London's green spaces and panoramic city views.

morning.name: Hyde Park Stroll
morning.desc: Morning walk through London's most famous park.

morning.name: Speaker's Corner
morning.desc: Historic site of free speech and public debate.

morning.name: Coffee at The Serpentine Bar
morning.desc: Lakeside cafe with peaceful park views.

afternoon.name: Lunch at The Natural History Museum Cafe
Camden Market
afternoon.desc: Alternative market with unique finds and street food.

evening.name: Primrose Hill
evening.desc: Best panoramic views of London's skyline.

evening.name: Heaven Nightclub
evening.desc: Legendary LGBTQ+ club under Charing Cross.

days.tip: Visit Primrose Hill at sunset for the most romantic views of London's skyline.

days.intro: Leisurely final morning before departure with a memorable farewell meal.

morning.name: Last-minute Shopping
morning.desc: Pick up souvenirs at nearby shops.

morning.name: Gelato at Gelupo
morning.desc: Award-winning Italian gelato near Piccadilly Circus.

afternoon.name: Check out of Hotel
afternoon.desc: Collect luggage and prepare for departure.

afternoon.name: Heathrow Express
afternoon.desc: Fast train service to the airport.

days.tip: Allow 3 hours for international flight departures from Heathrow Airport.

food.intro: London's food scene is incredibly diverse with excellent vegetarian and Indian options throughout the city.
food.tip: Most London restaurants can accommodate vegetarian diets, but always mention dietary requirements when booking.

neighborhoods.name: South Bank
neighborhoods.desc: Riverside location near Borough Market and Tate Modern
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walking distance to major attractions and markets

neighborhoods.name: Covent Garden
neighborhoods.desc: Central location with theaters and shopping

neighborhoods.name: Shoreditch
neighborhoods.whyStay: Hip neighborhood with great bars and restaurants

luxury.name: Sea Containers London

hotels.tip: Book accommodations near tube stations for easy access to all parts of London.

getYourGuide.name: London Food Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Guided tour of Borough Market and local eateries with vegetarian focus.

getYourGuide.name: Thames River Cruise
getYourGuide.desc: Romantic boat ride past London's most famous landmarks.

hiddenGems.name: God's Own Junkyard
hiddenGems.desc: Neon wonderland gallery showcasing vintage signs and movie props.

packing.title: April London Packing Guide
packing.intro: Pack layers for London's unpredictable April weather with mild temperatures and occasional rain showers.
packing.luggage: A carry-on suitcase should be sufficient for a 4-day trip with one checked bag for souvenirs.
packing.tip: London weather can change quickly, so pack layers and always carry a compact umbrella.

bookTrip.intro: Flights from Philadelphia to London typically cost $600-800 per person in April.
